name: Dexamethasone
description: Kortikosteroid synthetic oo muddo dheer shaqaynaysa. Loo isticmaalo bararka maskaxda (bararka maskaxda sare -- HACE, TBI), dareen-celinta xasaasiyadda daran, bararka marin-haweedka, iyo dhibaatada adrenal. Anti-bararka, ma aha anabolic.
indications: bararka marin hawomareen (ka dib extubation stridor, croup)
Bararka maskaxda oo ka yimaada buro ama nabar
Dareen-celin xasaasiyadeed oo daran (oo ku xiran epinephrine)
dose: Bararka maskaxda/HACE: 8-10 mg IV/IM bilawga, ka dibna 4 mg q6h. Bararka marin-haweedka: 10 mg IV hal mar. Croup: 0.6 mg/kg IM/PO (ugu badnaan 16mg). Dhibaatada Adrenal: 4 mg IV.
window: HACE: Sii sida ugu dhaqsaha badan ee suurtogalka ah oo ay la socoto soo degid degdeg ah.
contraindications: Caabuqyada fangas habaysan (iyada oo aan la daboolin antifungal)
warnings: Uma beddelo soo degista iyo ogsijiinta ee HACE -- u isticmaal isku-xidhka kaliya.
Hyperglycemia -- la soco gulukoosta dhiigga ee dadka macaanka qaba.
Immunosuppression iyadoo la isticmaalayo waqti dheer.
Qaadashada kelida ah ee xaaladaha degdegga ah guud ahaan aad bay u ammaan badan yihiin.

pediatric.dose: Croup: 0.6 mg/kg PO/IM (ugu badnaan 16 mg). Bararka maskaxda: 0.5-1 mg/kg IV (ugu badnaan 10 mg). Bararka marin-haweedka: 0.5 mg/kg IV.

obstetric.note: 12 mg IM q24h x 2 qiyaasood oo loo isticmaalo in lagu dardar galiyo qaangaadhka sambabada uurjiifka ee 24-34 toddobaad uurka ee foosha kahor. Kala hadal bixiyeha ugu sarreeya ee la heli karo.

source: JTS CPG / Wilderness Medicine / Standard Emergency Pharmacology
